sections.paragraph: εἴσοδος, ου, ἡ [εἰς, ὁδός; the mng. ‘place of entrance’ is not used in the NT] as activity, ‘a going in’, entry/entrance Hb 10:19; of the act of arriving on the scene Ac 13:24; w. focus on welcome of the one who arrives reception 1 Th 1:9; 2:1; 2 Pt 1:11 (as the verb ἐπιχορηγέω suggests, an appropriate entry will be orchestrated).
